api.conversation_upgrade: Conversation API requires Team plan ($29/mo). Team includes: external bot integration (Telegram, Slack), REST API, webhooks, and custom AI instructions.
api.webhooks_upgrade: Outbound webhooks require Team plan ($29/mo). Team includes: event notifications to external services, deploy hooks for Vercel/Netlify, and Slack integration.
auth.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.
auth.invalid_state: Invalid or expired authentication state. Please try signing in again.
auth.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
cdn.upgrade: CDN delivery requires Pro plan ($12/mo). Pro includes: 20GB bandwidth, API key management, automatic builds on content change, and ETag caching.
content.not_found: Content not found for this model and locale.
content.validation_failed: Content validation failed. Please check the required fields and field types.
generic.server_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.
media.library_upgrade: Media library requires Pro plan ($12/mo). Pro includes: Asset Manager with 5GB storage, image optimization, variant generation, and CDN delivery. Upgrade in workspace settings.
media.storage_not_configured: Media storage is not configured. Contact your administrator to set up R2 storage credentials.
media.upload_upgrade: Media upload requires Pro plan ($12/mo). Pro includes: image upload, optimization, variant generation (hero, card, thumb, og sizes), and CDN delivery. For now, you can use external image URLs (Unsplash, etc) directly in content fields.
model.access_denied: You don't have access to this model. Your role is restricted to specific models.
model.not_found: Content model not found. It may have been deleted or renamed.
project.not_found: Project not found or you don't have access.
rate.limit_exceeded: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
storage.quota_exceeded: Storage quota exceeded. Upgrade your plan for more storage or delete unused assets.
upload.file_too_large: File exceeds the size limit for your plan. Pro: 10MB, Team: 50MB, Enterprise: 100MB.
upload.type_not_allowed: This file type is not allowed. Supported: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, AVIF, SVG, MP4, WebM, PDF.
workspace.not_found: Workspace not found or you don't have access.
